examples.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Save to Cloud Bucket

examples.title: Enable Automatic Hyphenation for PDF Text
examples.description: Demonstrates how to turn on automatic hyphenation for a TextFragment in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, including setting the hyphen symbol via reflection for version compatibility.

examples.title: Extract Email Addresses from PDF Pages Using Regex
examples.description: Demonstrates how to search each page of a PDF for email addresses using a regular expression with Aspose.Pdf's TextFragmentAbsorber and collect the matches per page.

examples.title: Extract Line-Break Y Positions from PDF Text Fragments
examples.description: Loads a PDF, extracts text fragments using Aspose.Pdf, determines distinct Y‑coordinates for each line within each fragment, and writes the line‑break positions to a JSON file.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text and Save Each Sentence on a Separate Page
examples.description: The example extracts all text from a source PDF, splits it into individual sentences, and creates a new PDF where each sentence is placed on its own page as a TextFragment.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF and Save to UTF-8 File
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extracting all page text using TextAbsorber, and writing the concatenated result to a UTF-8 encoded text file.

examples.title: Extract Text and Count Words per PDF Page
examples.description: Loads a PDF, extracts the text from each page, counts the words, and writes the page number and word count to a CSV file.

examples.title: Find MM/DD/YYYY Dates in PDF Using Regex
examples.description: Loads a PDF document and uses a regular‑expression based TextFragmentAbsorber to locate all dates in the MM/DD/YYYY format, printing each match with its page number and saving the unchanged PDF.

examples.title: Find and Locate Phrase Occurrences in PDF using TextFragmentAbsorber
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's TextFragmentAbsorber to search for a specific phrase in a PDF, retrieve each fragment's bounding box coordinates, and report the total occurrences.

examples.title: Fuzzy Text Search in PDF using Regex
examples.description: Shows how to locate approximate matches of a phrase in a PDF by applying a regular‑expression pattern with TextFragmentAbsorber and TextSearchOptions.

examples.title: Hide Floating Box on Mouse Exit Using ButtonField
examples.description: Shows how to create a hidden TextBoxField and a transparent ButtonField in a PDF, then assign a HideAction to the button's OnExit event to hide the floating box when the mouse leaves.

examples.title: Identify and Process Line Breaks in PDF Text Fragments
examples.description: Shows how to use ParagraphAbsorber to retrieve markup paragraphs, iterate through TextFragment lines, detect soft hyphen line breaks, and merge fragments for custom layout handling.

examples.title: Create Inline Text and Image in a PDF Paragraph
examples.description: Demonstrates how to combine a TextFragment and an Image within the same paragraph to produce an inline text‑image element in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert Formatted Endnote with Bold and Italic Styles
examples.description: Shows how to add an endnote to a paragraph and apply bold and italic formatting using TextState in Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert Hyperlink into PDF Text Segment
examples.description: Shows how to add a clickable hyperlink to a PDF by creating a TextSegment with a WebHyperlink, attaching it to a TextFragment, and placing it on a page.

examples.title: Insert Rotated Text on Second PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, create a rotated TextFragment, place it on the second page using TextBuilder, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Insert Same Text on All PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, loop through each page, and add an identical plain‑text fragment to the page's Paragraphs collection.

examples.title: Left Align Text in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to add a text fragment to a PDF page and align it to the left margin by setting TextState.HorizontalAlignment to Left.

examples.title: Load Custom TrueType Font from Memory Stream and Use in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a TrueType font from a memory stream, embedding it, and applying it to a TextFragment via TextState in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Render Bidirectional Text in PDF with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to add a text fragment containing Arabic (right‑to‑left) and English (left‑to‑right) to a PDF, set the appropriate font and text state, and save the document.

examples.title: Render Subscript Text in PDF using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF document and display subscript characters by setting the Subscript property (negative rise) on a TextFragment.

examples.title: Render Superscript Text in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add normal and superscript text to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf by setting the TextState.Superscript flag and adjusting font size.

examples.title: Replace 'Confidential' with 'Public' in a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to locate and replace every occurrence of a specific word in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's TextFragmentAbsorber and TextSearchOptions.

examples.title: Replace Phrase While Preserving Formatting in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to find a specific phrase in a PDF and replace it with new text while keeping the original font, size, color, and other formatting using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Replace Text on Specific PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to replace a given phrase only within a defined page range of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's TextFragmentAbsorber.

examples.title: Replace Text and Rotate PDF Page in Memory
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a memory stream, replacing specific text, rotating the first page, and saving the modified PDF back to a memory stream.

examples.title: Retrieve Line Break Information from PDF Text Fragments
examples.description: Shows how to extract text fragments from a PDF, split them into logical lines, and log line‑break details along with the position of each text segment.

examples.title: Right‑Align Text on a PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to right‑align a text fragment on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf by setting the TextState.HorizontalAlignment property.

examples.title: Rotate 'Draft' Text Fragments in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to find every occurrence of the word "Draft" in a PDF and apply a 15‑degree rotation to those text fragments using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Rotate Header Text Fragments in PDFs
examples.description: Iterates through PDF files in a folder, extracts text fragments, treats large‑font fragments as headers, and rotates those fragments 90 degrees before saving the modified PDFs.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Form Field Text via Appearance Stream
examples.description: Shows how to rotate the text inside a PDF textbox form field by accessing its appearance stream and setting a transformation matrix with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Title Text by 45 Degrees
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor to rotate the title text (page content) of PDF files by 45 degrees and save the resulting documents.

examples.title: Rotate Specific Text Fragment in PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF, finds a specified text fragment on the first page, rotates it 45 degrees, and saves the modified document.

examples.title: Rotate Table Cell Text by 60 Degrees
examples.description: Demonstrates how to locate a table cell in a PDF, rotate each text fragment inside the cell by 60 degrees using TextFragment.Rotation, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Rotate Text in PDF Using TextState Rotation
examples.description: Shows how to add a text fragment to a PDF page and rotate it by setting the TextState.Rotation property before placement.

examples.title: Save PDF to Byte Array Using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, optionally modify it, and save it into a MemoryStream to obtain a byte array for transmission or further processing.

examples.title: Search and Replace Text with Clickable Hyperlink in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to find a phrase in a PDF, replace it with new text, and attach a clickable URL link using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Search Text in PDF and Log Extraction Errors
examples.description: Shows how to enable logging of text‑extraction errors while searching for a phrase in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and write the results to a log file.

examples.title: Set Character Spacing on a TextFragment
examples.description: Demonstrates how to configure the TextState.CharacterSpacing property of a TextFragment to control inter‑character gaps before adding the fragment to a PDF page.

examples.title: Set Custom Line Height for PDF Text
examples.description: Demonstrates how to adjust the line spacing (line height) of a text fragment in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's TextState.LineSpacing property.

examples.title: Set Text Opacity in PDF using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to make text semi‑transparent by setting the alpha channel of the TextFragment's foreground color before appending it to a PDF page.

examples.title: Show Floating Box on Button Hover Using HideAction
examples.description: Demonstrates assigning a HideAction to a button's OnEnter and OnExit events to display and hide a floating text annotation when the mouse hovers over the button.

examples.title: Simulate Kerning Using CharacterSpacing in PDF TextFragment
examples.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a TextFragment and adjusts its CharacterSpacing to simulate kerning before appending it to the first page and saving the document.

examples.title: Style TextFragment with Font Size and Color
examples.description: Demonstrates how to set the font size, text color, and font family for a TextFragment via its TextState and add the styled fragment to a PDF page.

examples.title: Add Custom Page Borders to PDF Using Graph
examples.description: Demonstrates how to draw a rectangular border on each page of an existing PDF by using Aspose.Pdf.Drawing.Graph and related drawing classes.

examples.title: Add Header and Footer to PDF Using XML Template
examples.description: Shows how to load an XML template, convert it to a PDF stamp, and apply that stamp as a header/footer on every page of an existing PDF document.

examples.title: Add Page Transition Effects to PDF from XML
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into a PDF, setting per-page presentation duration, and applying a fade transition to all pages using PdfPageEditor.

examples.title: Apply Background Images to PDF Pages from XML
examples.description: Shows how to read an XML file that maps page numbers to image files and set each PDF page's background image using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Apply Conditional Page Margins in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to assign different margin sizes to PDF pages based on their page number using Aspose.PDF's MarginInfo and PageInfo objects.

examples.title: Apply Custom Font to XML‑Derived PDF Elements
examples.description: The example loads an XML file, converts it to a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, and applies a custom TrueType font to specific text fragments such as titles and subtitles within the generated PDF.

examples.title: Apply XML Color as PDF Page Background
examples.description: Loads a PDF, parses an XML color string, sets it as the background color for each page, and saves the modified document.

examples.title: Batch Convert XML Files to PDF using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to iterate over a folder of XML files, load each with Aspose.Pdf's XmlLoadOptions, and save them as separate PDF documents.

examples.title: Batch XML to PDF Conversion Performance Profiling
examples.description: Processes all XML files in a directory, converts each to PDF using Aspose.Pdf, and measures load and save times to help identify performance bottlenecks.

examples.title: Compress PDF Text Objects from XML Using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates loading XML into a PDF with XmlLoadOptions, enabling object compression via OptimizationOptions, and saving the reduced-size PDF.

examples.title: Compress PDF Streams from XML using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from its XML representation, applying stream compression with OptimizationOptions, and saving the reduced‑size PDF.

examples.title: Compress PDF Text Streams Using Flate via XML Conversion
examples.description: Shows how to export a PDF to XML, reload it, and apply Flate compression to all objects (including text streams) using Aspose.Pdf optimization features.

examples.title: Convert PDF Pages to High-Resolution PNG Thumbnails
examples.description: The example loads a PDF document, iterates through each page, and saves every page as a 300 DPI PNG image for thumbnail creation.

examples.title: Convert XML with Multiple Namespaces to PDF using XSLT
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file, applying an XSLT that declares distinct namespace prefixes, and directly creating a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Convert XML to HTML preview using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to load an XML file into an Aspose.Pdf Document, convert it to PDF in memory, and save the result as HTML for web preview.

examples.title: Convert XML to PDF Using Default XSLT
examples.description: Shows how to load an XML file with Aspose.Pdf's XmlLoadOptions and generate a PDF using the built‑in default XSLT transformation.

examples.title: Convert XML to PDF with Malformed XML Handling
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into Aspose.Pdf, handling malformed XML via a warning callback, and saving the result as a PDF with proper exception handling.

examples.title: Convert XML Files to PDF with Aspose.Pdf and Log Processing Steps

examples.title: Convert XML with XSLT to PDF using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file with a custom XSLT stylesheet via XmlLoadOptions and converting the transformed content to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create PDF Bookmarks from XML Hierarchy
examples.description: Shows how to parse an XML document that defines a nested structure and generate matching PDF bookmarks using Aspose.Pdf's bookmark editor.

examples.title: Create PDF Form Fields from XML and Set Default Values
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XFA form definition from an XML file into a PDF, generating the form fields, and assigning default values to specific fields.

examples.title: Create PDF Outline from XML Sections
examples.description: The example reads an XML file with section titles and page numbers, then adds matching outline (bookmark) entries to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create PDF Outline from XML Hierarchy
examples.description: Shows how to parse an XML file that defines bookmark nesting and generate matching PDF outlines using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor.

examples.title: Create PDF Thumbnail from XML-derived PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load an XML file as a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and generate a PNG thumbnail of the first page.

examples.title: Decode Base64 Images from XML and Embed into PDF
examples.description: Loads an XML file, extracts Base64‑encoded image data, decodes it, and adds each image to a new page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Digitally Sign PDF Generated from XML

examples.title: Downsample Images in PDF from XML
examples.description: Shows how to load an XML file into a PDF, configure image downsampling using optimization options, and save the optimized PDF.

examples.title: Embed 3D Models from XML into PDF as Interactive Annotations
examples.description: Shows how to read an XML file that references U3D/PRC model files and embed each model as a PDF3DAnnotation on the specified PDF pages using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.description: Shows how to read an XML file that defines audio clip positions and embed each audio file as a SoundAnnotation in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Embed Custom TrueType Font into PDF from XML

examples.description: Shows how to convert an XML file to PDF using Aspose.Pdf and then add document‑level and field‑level JavaScript actions for form validation.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF from XML using AES‑256 with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into a PDF document, applying AES‑256 encryption with user and owner passwords and specific permissions, then saving the protected PDF.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF from XML with Permissions and AES-256
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into an Aspose.Pdf Document, applying AES-256 encryption with user and owner passwords, and setting print and content-extraction permissions before saving the protected PDF.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF from XML with Password Protection
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, applying user and owner passwords with specific permissions, and saving the encrypted document.

examples.title: Export PDF Pages as BMP Images from XML
examples.description: Loads an XML file, binds it to a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf, and saves each PDF page as a separate BMP image file.

examples.title: Export PDF Pages as High-Resolution PNG Images from XML
examples.description: Demonstrates converting an XML file to PDF using Aspose.Pdf and then exporting each PDF page to a PNG image with a specified DPI resolution.

examples.title: Export PDF Structure to XML
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and save its internal structure as an XML file for analysis and validation.

examples.title: Extract Plain Text from PDF for Indexing
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF generated from XML, extracting its plain text using Aspose.Pdf's TextAbsorber, and saving the result to a file for indexing.

examples.title: Generate Barcode in PDF from XML Layout
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF defined by an XML file, fill a barcode form field with Code128 data using Aspose.Pdf, and save the resulting PDF.

examples.title: Generate PDF from XML with Full‑Screen Viewer Mode
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into an Aspose.Pdf Document, configuring the viewer to open in full‑screen mode, and saving the result as a PDF.

examples.title: Generate PDF from XML using XSL Styling
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file with an XSL stylesheet to apply custom colors and converting it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Generate PDF from XML using XSLT Config
examples.description: This example reads XML, XSLT, and output paths from a JSON configuration file, applies the XSLT transformation while loading the XML with Aspose.Pdf, and saves the resulting PDF.

examples.title: Generate PDF from XML with PDF version 1.7
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into an Aspose.Pdf Document, converting it to PDF version 1.7, and saving the resulting PDF.

examples.title: Generate PDF from XML with Custom Page Size
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file with Aspose.Pdf, applying custom page‑size settings to the first page, and saving the result as a PDF.

examples.title: Generate PDF from XML using XSL‑FO Template
examples.description: Shows how to load an XML file with an XSL‑FO stylesheet using Aspose.Pdf and save the transformed content as a PDF document.

examples.title: Generate PDF from XSL‑FO with Custom Parsing Error Handling
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XSL‑FO file into Aspose.Pdf with a custom warning handler to gracefully manage XML parsing errors, then saving the result as a PDF.

examples.title: Generate PDF Table from XML Data

examples.title: Generate PDF Table of Contents from XML Headings
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read a heading hierarchy from an XML file and build a Table of Contents in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content features.

examples.title: Generate PDF with Retry Logic for Transient I/O Errors
examples.description: Demonstrates loading, modifying, and saving a PDF with Aspose.Pdf while applying retry logic to handle transient I/O errors.

examples.title: Insert Conditional Page Breaks Based on XML Content Length
examples.description: Shows how to load an XML file into a PDF, calculate cumulative text length per page, and insert blank pages when a specified length threshold is exceeded.

examples.title: Insert Dynamic Headers into PDF Using XML Data
examples.description: Demonstrates reading per-page header text from an XML file and adding it to each PDF page as a header using Aspose.Pdf event handling.

examples.title: Insert Footnotes into PDF from XML
examples.description: Demonstrates loading footnote definitions from an XML file and inserting them as footnote references and content into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert Automatic Page Numbers into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add sequential page numbers to an existing PDF file using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileStamp facade.

examples.title: Load XML from MemoryStream and Add to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to read XML data from a MemoryStream, convert it to a string, and insert it as a TextFragment into a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Merge PDFs Created from XML Files
examples.description: Loads multiple XML files, converts each to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, merges them into a single document, and saves the combined PDF.

examples.title: Paginate Large XML into Multiple PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a large XML file with Aspose.Pdf, splitting its pages into fixed-size chunks, and saving each chunk as a sequentially numbered PDF file.

examples.title: Populate PDF Form Fields from XML Records
examples.description: Shows how to read multiple <Record> elements from an XML file, fill an XFA PDF form using Aspose.Pdf's AssignXfa for each record, and save individual filled PDFs.

examples.description: Demonstrates adding a PdfOutputGenerator as a singleton to the IServiceCollection so it can be reused across the application.

examples.title: Render HTML CDATA Sections to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file, extracting CDATA sections that contain HTML fragments, and rendering each fragment into a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Render SVG Elements from XML into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load an XML file, extract embedded <svg> elements, convert each SVG to a temporary PDF using Aspose.Pdf's SvgLoadOptions, and merge the resulting pages into a single PDF document.

examples.title: Repeat Table Header Rows on Each PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to create a multi‑page table in a PDF and configure Aspose.Pdf to repeat the header row on every page.

examples.title: Resize PDF Pages Using XML-Defined Page Size
examples.description: Reads width and height values from an XML file and applies them to each page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set Custom Page Margins from XML
examples.description: Demonstrates loading margin definitions from an XML file and applying them to specific page ranges in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Transition Durations from XML
examples.description: Loads timing values from an XML file and applies them to each PDF page's Duration property using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Orientation from XML
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XML layout file, creating a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, and setting each page's orientation (landscape or portrait) based on XML attributes.

examples.title: Set PDF Permissions to Disable Printing and Copying
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file as a PDF, applying AES‑256 encryption with custom permissions that block printing and content extraction, and saving the protected PDF.

examples.title: Set PDF Viewer Preferences When Converting XML to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates converting an XML file to PDF with Aspose.Pdf and configuring viewer preferences such as FitWindow (fit‑page mode).

examples.title: Thread‑Safe XML to PDF Conversion Using Parallel Processing
examples.description: Demonstrates how to safely convert multiple XML files to PDF in parallel using Aspose.Pdf's XmlLoadOptions and Document classes.

examples.title: Validate PDF/A‑2b Compliance After Converting XML to PDF
examples.description: Loads an XML file, converts it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, and validates the generated PDF for PDF/A‑2b compliance, outputting a validation log.

examples.title: Validate XML against XSD and Generate PDF
examples.description: The example validates an XML file using an XSD schema and, if valid, loads it into an Aspose.Pdf Document to create a PDF file.

examples.title: Unit Tests for XML‑to‑PDF Conversion with XSLT
examples.description: Shows how to convert XML documents to PDF using Aspose.Pdf with optional XSLT transformations and validates the results with NUnit unit tests.

examples.title: Convert XML to PDF with External CSS via XSL
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file with an XSL stylesheet that references external CSS and converting it directly to a styled PDF using Aspose.Pdf.
